title: Peaks Client
description: A kitchen sink client with graphic, optimization and  gameplay improvements. 8x FPS!
body:
![Made for Modrinth](https://github.com/weblabsaus/alpineclient/blob/main/icons/alpina/cozy.png?raw=true) ![Made for Modrinth](https://github.com/weblabsaus/alpineclient/blob/main/icons/mr/cozy.png?raw=true)


Peaks is a kitchen sink client, primarily featuring many new and fresh HUDs that optimize as well as improve your experience. It also comes with the popular mods pre-baked, such as Sodium (improves FPS by 50%), Capes+ (OptiFine Capes & More) and the various RAY's 3d mods. That being said, this dosen't alter the vanilla experience much. It also adds some little known peformance mods, such as FastChest. It also adds a FPS and ping HUD in the top left corner, as well as a map. Yes, we have the mod menu. **Alpine Client has rebranded to Peaks client.**
Title Screen ![Title Screen](https://github.com/weblabsaus/alpineclient/blob/main/titlescreen.png?raw=true)
Loading Screen ![Loading Screen](https://github.com/weblabsaus/alpineclient/blob/main/loading.png?raw=true) There's plenty more goodies for you to discover!
Special Thanks to AlphaLeoli for letting me put his customizable totem mod in the modpack and moehrag for the Insomnia Mod Credits in Mod Dependencies
